name_cn:
LD - Mini Lindy
Color: Blue Lin
Togo leather
Gold hardware
A versatile Mini Lindy, beautiful yet capable of winning your heart ❤️ Proven fact: the more excellent, the harder they work 💪 The harder they work, the luckier they get. Lucky you to own this lively, relaxed little cutie~
Size: 19.5cm x 12.5cm
